title: helichrysum uninervium
intro: Helichrysum uninervium, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is also known as African curry plant or yellow fever plant, due to its potential properties to ward off the yellow fever disease. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum uninervium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Helichrysum uninervium can be prepared as an essential oil, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
